'''Research Station Shantipole''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Roche system]]. It was primarily staffed by [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the asteroid was the site of the [[Shantipole Project]], in which [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]] worked with [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] to develop<ref name="SFS" /> the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter]].<ref name="CA5">''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]''</ref> When the Empire became aware of this, Governor [[Bane Nothos]] [[Blockade of the Roche system|blockaded]] the system. However, the Rebels [[Battle of Roche (Galactic Civil War)|broke]] the blockade with the B-wing prototypes and blew up Research Station Shantipole, resulting in Nothos' demotion to Commander.<ref name="SFS" />
